task_completion.description: FreeCAD is launched and visible on the screen.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD application window is open and active.

task_completion.description: A 60x60x60 mm base cube is created.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A cube is visible in the 3D view, or a 'Cube'/'Pad' feature is present in the Model tree. Dimensions of 60 mm may be visible in the property editor or sketcher.

task_completion.description: Three 20 mm diameter cylinders (or hole sketches) are created along the X, Y, and Z axes.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Three cylinders or circular sketches are visible in the 3D view or Model tree. A radius of 10 mm or diameter of 20 mm may be visible in the properties.

task_completion.description: The holes are subtracted from the cube to create the manifold block.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D view shows a cube with circular holes on all six faces, passing through the center. The Model tree shows a 'Cut', 'Pocket', or similar Boolean subtraction operation.

task_completion.description: The model is saved as manifold_block.FCStd in the specified directory.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The FreeCAD window title bar shows 'manifold_block.FCStd', or a save dialog confirms the path /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/manifold_block.FCStd.

integrity.description: The agent used the FreeCAD graphical user interface to create the model.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show mouse clicks, menu selections, and tool usage within the FreeCAD GUI, rather than terminal commands executing a script.
The sequence of screenshots shows the model tree growing (e.g., first a cube, then cylinders, then a cut) rather than the final model appearing instantly.

integrity.description: The model is rendered within FreeCAD's 3D workspace.
integrity.visual_evidence: The 3D model is shown inside the FreeCAD application with the standard FreeCAD grid, view cube, and toolbars, not an image viewer or web browser.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected output is a 60x60x60 mm cube with three 20 mm diameter (10 mm radius) holes passing through its center along the X, Y, and Z axes. The final file must be saved to /home/ga/Documents/FreeCAD/manifold_block.FCStd.
